name: Divide the Debt by Zero
text:
take the total number of Favors owed in the world and divide it by zero. the resulting amount of life is lost by everyone who is not the Don. the Don gains the same amount, which is also undefined, which is fine, the Don has always been comfortable with undefined.
the accountant tried to stop you. the accountant is now also undefined. the spreadsheet ascends. it knows things now.
this effect happens an infinite number of times, quickly, and then once more for luck.
flavorText: "you can't divide by zero." "i'm not the one who can't. you are. the Don can."
